name: Best Choice Bus Trading Inc
recent_news: No web presence found for 'Best Choice Bus Trading Inc'; the registered address (9710 Alaska Cir, Boca Raton) is also associated with G&S Best Choice Auto Sales LLC (an inactive Florida LLC). Company name 'Bus Trading' suggests vehicle dealer/broker rather than a student-transport contractor.
fit_notes: Likely not an operating school-bus contractor. Name and address pattern (shared with an inactive auto-sales LLC out of a residential Boca Raton address) suggest a bus dealer/broker or shell entity, not a fleet contractor. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: North Branch Bus Co
recent_news: Long-tenured small contractor (~30 years per directories) serving the Bowler School District in rural Shawano County, WI. No recent M&A or news.
fit_notes: Micro-scale single-district contractor (~15 employees, single rural WI district). Too small and remote for a meaningful Summit tuck-in; possible bolt-on only if part of a broader Wisconsin roll-up. Out of Summit's current state footprint.

name: Student Transit - Eau Claire, Inc.
recent_news: Four-generation Fey family business founded 1939 by Ray Fey Sr. and Fred Fey (originally city-transit operator, retained school-bus contracts after 1975). Named Eau Claire Small Business of the Year. Actively hiring drivers/monitors as of 2026; no acquisition signals.
fit_notes: Attractive multi-generational Wisconsin family operator with 85+ years of continuous operation and three contracted districts in Eau Claire MSA. Note: revenue estimate in source data ($434k) appears far too low - one local article referenced ~500 buses (likely inflated/incorrect) but Student Transit is clearly mid-sized, not single-bus. Worth direct outreach as a credible WI tuck-in if Summit expands into Wisconsin; succession signal low given active 3rd/4th generation family leadership.

name: Monroe Bus Lines Inc
principals: Herman Freund (President, Monroe Bus Corporation - possibly related entity)
districts_or_customers: Hasidic/Orthodox Jewish private schools (yeshivas) in Brooklyn/Monroe NY area (inferred)
recent_news: Brooklyn-based small operator at 1272 E 5th St (Midwood). Likely affiliated with the larger Monroe Bus Corporation (60 Nostrand Ave Brooklyn / 16 Forest Rd Monroe NY, led by Herman Freund) which operates ~30 buses per NYSDOT records; serves Kiryas Joel/Monroe routes per Excellent Bus Service schedules. Affiliation between 'Monroe Bus Lines Inc' and 'Monroe Bus Corporation' is unconfirmed.
fit_notes: Likely a niche operator serving Orthodox Jewish private schools / Monroe-to-Brooklyn yeshiva commute routes - a specialized customer base that may be culturally and operationally difficult to integrate. Confirm whether 'Monroe Bus Lines Inc' is the same as the Freund-family Monroe Bus Corporation before pursuing; low-to-medium fit for a Summit tuck-in.

name: Northeast Pennsylvania Bus
districts_or_customers: Wyoming Valley West School District (Kingston, PA) - probable, unconfirmed
recent_news: No web presence located for a company named 'Northeast Pennsylvania Bus' at 3rd Ave, Kingston PA. Wyoming Valley West SD (HQ at 450 N Maple Ave, Kingston) is the likely customer but does not publicly name contractors. Kingston City SD (NY, not PA) uses First Student. No M&A or ownership signals available.
fit_notes: Insufficient public information to qualify. Sub-12 employee Luzerne County PA contractor possibly serving Wyoming Valley West SD; would require direct outreach/phone call to (570) 283-9271 to confirm ownership, fleet size, and contract scope before considering as a Summit tuck-in.
